title: Text Styling
description: Learn bold, italic, and other text styles
instructions:
Use Typst text styling syntax to produce the following output:

1. First line: write "Typst" in bold
2. Second line: write "is awesome" in italic
3. Third line: write "really" in both bold and italic
hint: Use *...* for bold and _..._ for italic. You can nest them for both effects.
